name: Jam-Filled Muffins
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup jam or preserves, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine flour, Cream of Wheat, brown sugar, baking powder, lemon peel, and poppy seed; set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine yogurt, egg substitute, and melted margarine. Stir into the flour mixture until just moistened.
3. Spoon batter into 12 greased muffin cups in a 2 1/2-inch muffin pan.
4. Bake at 375°F for 18-20 minutes or until lightly golden.
5. Remove muffins from the pan onto a cooling rack.
6. While the muffins are still warm, poke a hole in the center of each muffin using the back of a spoon.
7. Fill the center of each hole with jam or preserves.
8. Serve warm.
